export const list_products = [
  {id: 1, name: "Pink Dress", price: 19.99, stock: 10, description: "Beautiful pink summer dress", category: "Dresses",image: pinkDress},
  {id: 2, name: "Blue Dress", price: 19.99, stock: 10, description: "Beautiful blue summer dress", category: "Dresses"},
  {id: 3, name: "Green Dress", price: 19.99, stock: 10, description: "Beautiful green summer dress", category: "Dresses"},
  {id: 4, name: "Red Dress", price: 19.99, stock: 10, description: "Beautiful red summer dress", category: "Dresses"},
  {id: 5, name: "Red Shirt", price: 9.99, stock: 20, description: "Casual cotton shirt", category: "Shirts" },

  {id: 9, name: "Blue Jeans", price: 29.99, stock: 15, description: "Stylish denim jeans", category: "Pants" },

  {id: 12, name: "Red Jacket", price: 49.99, stock: 5, description: "Warm winter jacket", category: "Jackets" },
